_comment: vast.ai instance configuration — use with vastai CLI or web UI

vastai_cli_examples.search: vastai search offers 'gpu_ram>=32 num_gpus=1 reliability>0.95 cuda_vers>=12.0' -o 'dph_total'
vastai_cli_examples.create: vastai create instance INSTANCE_ID --image ghcr.io/YOUR_GITHUB_USER/vllm-multi-gemma:latest --disk 100 --env '-e MODEL_NAME=gemma2-cosmos -e HF_TOKEN=hf_xxx -e PORT=8000' --direct
